milestones.name: Phase 1: Core Logic + Playable Prototype
milestones.description: Playable level with colored rectangles on a road network. No sprites, no polish — just working mechanics.
milestones.notes: All core logic, rendering, isometric system, jelly polish, UI screens, save/load, and level design complete.

milestones.name: Phase 2: Visual Polish + Content
milestones.description: Replace rectangles with real assets, add audio, create 20 levels. Game looks and sounds like a real product.
milestones.notes: Art pipeline repo set up (#41 closed). Style guide drafted. Blender pipeline decided (ADR-003). Vehicle sprites (#43), road tiles (#44), environment (#45), and audio (#55-#58) remain.

milestones.name: Phase 3: Monetization + Store Launch
milestones.description: AdMob integration, Firebase Analytics, hint system, undo button, store assets, QA, and publish to Google Play.

milestones.name: Phase 4: Post-Launch Iteration
milestones.description: Respond to data and feedback, expand content (30+ levels), story progression, vehicle variety, daily challenges.
